title: Mighty Raju
desc: A four-year-old Raju, who received superpowers due to a scientific blunder, decides to use them for the good of humanity.

title: Mighty Raju
desc: A four-year-old Raju, who received superpowers due to a scientific blunder, decides to use them for the good of humanity.

title: PAW Patrol
desc: A pack of six brave rescue puppies is led by the tech-savvy human, Ryder. They use their unique skills and gadgets to help the people of their town and thwart the evil plans of Mayor Humdinger.

title: Ninja Hattori
desc: Kenichi Mitsuba is a ten-year-old average student. A little ninja, Hattori Kanzo, becomes his friend. Hattori always helps Kenichi with his problems, and is observant of him.

title: Guru Aur Bhole
desc: Two close friends, Guru and Bhole, live in the quaint little town of Surtaal Nagar in North India. They always end up in sticky situations but have a musical adventure while trying to get out of it.

title: Kicko & Super Speedo
desc: A superhero child and his special car, Super Speedo, which is fitted with innovative gadgets, go on many adventures to save the world from villains.

title: Akki Jaanbaaz
desc: Akki, a young boy, juggles his life as a student and a superhero. He embarks on various adventures and helps those around him.

title: Asuras
desc: Two 'asura' kids, Akul and Nakul are sent to earth by their teacher to change the outlook that humans have about 'asuras'. So, the two take on human form and help the humans in their little town.
